phases.title: Dissolution of Parliament
phases.description: The King, on the advice of the Prime Minister, dissolves Parliament, triggering a general election.

phases.title: Campaign Period
phases.description: Political parties and candidates campaign across 650 constituencies.

phases.title: Polling Day
phases.description: Voters cast their ballot for a Member of Parliament (MP) in their local constituency.

phases.title: Forming a Government
phases.description: The party with an absolute majority of MPs (326+) forms the government. The leader becomes Prime Minister.
